\-- Q1  
Query:  
SELECT status,   
count(transaction\_id) as total\_transactions  
from transactions  
group by 1;

Result: Shows the number of captured, chargeback and failed transactions  
![][image1]

\-- Q2  
Query:  
SELECT merchant\_name,   
sum(usd\_amount) as total\_gmv  
from transactions  
where status \= 'Captured'  
group by 1;

Result: Shows GMV of each merchant  
![][image2]

\--Q3  
Query:   
SELECT   
merchant\_name,   
SUM(usd\_amount) AS total\_gmv  
FROM transactions   
WHERE status \= 'Captured'  \-- Filters out Failed and Chargeback rows  
GROUP BY merchant\_name  
ORDER BY total\_gmv DESC     \-- Changed to DESC to see top merchants first  
LIMIT 10;

Result: Shows total CAPTURED GMV of each merchant  
![][image3]

\-- Q4  
Query:  
SELECT   
transaction\_date,   
SUM(usd\_amount) AS total\_daily\_gmv, \-- Added comma here  
COUNT(transaction\_id) AS successful\_transactions  
FROM transactions  
WHERE status \= 'Captured'  
GROUP BY transaction\_date  
ORDER BY transaction\_date;

Result: Shows daily captured GMV with number of successful transactions  
![][image4]

\--Q5  
Query:  
SELECT   
merchant\_name,  
SUM(CASE WHEN status \= 'Chargeback' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS chargeback\_count,  
COUNT(transaction\_id) AS total\_transactions,  
(SUM(CASE WHEN status \= 'Chargeback' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) \* 100.0 / COUNT(transaction\_id)) AS chargeback\_ratio  
FROM transactions  
GROUP BY merchant\_name  
HAVING (SUM(CASE WHEN status \= 'Chargeback' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) \* 100.0 / COUNT(transaction\_id)) \> 1  
ORDER BY chargeback\_ratio DESC;

Result: Shows the chargeback ratio of each merchant whose ratio is greater than 1  
![][image5]

–Q6  
Query:  
SELECT gateway\_region,   
AVG(risk\_score) AS average\_risk,   
COUNT(transaction\_id) AS total\_transactions  
FROM transactions  
GROUP BY gateway\_region  
HAVING AVG(risk\_score) \> 50   
   AND COUNT(transaction\_id) \> 20;  

Result: Shows  high risk region  
![][image6]

–Q7  
Query:  
SELECT   
u.user\_id,   
u.user\_name,   
t.transaction\_date,   
COUNT(t.transaction\_id) AS risky\_transaction\_count  
FROM users u  
JOIN transactions t ON u.user\_id \= t.user\_id  
WHERE t.status IN ('Failed E05 Timeout', 'Chargeback')  
GROUP BY u.user\_id, u.user\_name, t.transaction\_date  
HAVING COUNT(t.transaction\_id) \>= 3;

Result:   
![][image7]

\--Q8   
SELECT   
merchant\_name,  
COUNT(transaction\_id) AS chargeback\_count,  
COUNT(DISTINCT user\_id) AS unique\_affected\_users,  
SUM(usd\_amount) AS total\_chargeback\_amount  
FROM transactions  
WHERE status \= 'Chargeback'  
GROUP BY merchant\_name  
ORDER BY total\_chargeback\_amount DESC;

Result:  
![][image8]
